fields.title: Migrate Ralph to Effect v4 service architecture
fields.description: Refactor extensions/tau/src/ralph/index.ts into an Effect-native Ralph core with schema-validated persisted state, typed errors, explicit layers, and a thin pi adapter boundary. Preserve Ralph fresh-session behavior and command-owned session actions while removing sync fs helpers, module globals, and Promise handshakes from the Ralph core.
fields.design: Follow the migration plan in .pi/ralph/ralph_effect.md. Split Ralph into schema/errors/service/adapter modules. Use ServiceMap.Service plus Layer.effect, FileSystem-backed persistence, Schema-based codecs, Ref/Queue/Deferred-style coordination, and boundary-only runEffect execution.
